results.title: UK government asks FIFA to investigate Argentina over Falklands banner celebration at World Cup
results.description: UK government has asked FIFA to luanch an investigation after Argentina players raised Falkland Islands banner during their celebration following their 2-1 win against England in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal.

results.title: Former Bristol lock Vui 'devastated' by doping ban
results.description: Former Bristol Bears lock Chris Vui says he has been left "devastated" after being banned until July 2027 for a contested doping violation.

results.title: Suffocating heat exacerbates Tour de France fatigue
results.description: The first 10 days of racing have taken place in temperatures which never dropped below 30 deg C, and often edged above 40 deg C.
